subcodes.first_line: O thou who art arisen for the service of the Cause of God! I received thy recent letter and rejoiced in spirit at its interesting contents
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
